rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §154.027 governs nonbinding arbitration procedure. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 154.027. ARBITRATION. (a) Nonbinding arbitration is a forum in which each party and counsel for the party present the position of the party before an impartial third party, who renders a specific award.
_note: No relationship between proposed Tax Code change and this arbitration statute.
